channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Fans Choose Sofia D’Angelo’s ‘Time’ as This Week’s Favorite New Music
item.description: 🎶 Sofia D’Angelo’s ‘Time’ is heating up the charts! 🔥 Let’s keep those vibes going, music lovers! 💃🏻 #NewMusicFriday

item.title: Maynard James Keenan Shows Support for Ex-Classmate, General Randy George, Following Ouster
item.description: "Rockstar reunion alert 🎸 Maynard James Keenan cheers on his ex-classmate General Randy George 🤘 Friends forever! #SupportivePeers #RockLegends"

item.title: Lululemon Updates Viral Festival Bag With Some Serious Streetwear Cred: Shop the Crossbody Here
item.description: Lululemon just leveled up their festival game! 🌟 Rock that street style with their new Crossbody bag! 💃👜 #FashionForward

item.title: Guns N’ Roses Play Rare Deep Cut Live for First Time in 35 Years at São Paulo Show
item.description: 🌹🎸 Rock legends Guns N' Roses surprised fans in São Paulo with an epic throwback at their latest show! 🤘🔥 #GnR #RockNRollRevival

item.title: Watch Jack White and Jack Black Reimagine “Seven Nation Army” on SNL
item.description: 🎸 Jack White + Jack Black = SNL magic! Watch their epic "Seven Nation Army" remix now! 🔥 #MusicCollab #SNLmoment
